title: evaluation — retrieval metrics contract
description: Shape of the dict returned by src/evaluate.py functions. The test suite imports these helpers — you do NOT need to reimplement them.

retrieved_doc_ids.description: Top-k doc_ids returned by the learner's retrieve.top_k_search(), in rank order (best first).

rank_of_expected.description: 1-based rank of expected_doc_id within retrieved_doc_ids, or null if not in the top-k.
